queries.question: Show me all reports and photographers with a deadline of 2021-03-18 16:30:00.
queries.sql:
SELECT reporters.Name 
FROM reporters
WHERE (reporters.role = "Reporter" OR reporters.role = "Photographer") AND reporters.deadline = "2021-03-18 16:30:00"
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/journalism#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/journalism/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?name WHERE {
  ?reporters a :Reporters .
  ?reporters p:name ?name .
  ?reporters p:role ?role_w .
  ?reporters p:role ?role_w2 .
  ?reporters p:deadline ?deadline_w .
  FILTER((((STR(?role_w) = "Reporter" || STR(?role_w2) = "Photographer")) && STR(?deadline_w) = "2021-03-18 16:30:00"))
}

queries.question: Show me all reports and photographers with a deadline of 2021-03-18 16:30:00.
queries.sql:
SELECT reporters.Name 
FROM reporters
WHERE reporters.role = "Reporter" OR reporters.role = "Photographer" AND reporters.deadline = "2021-03-18 16:30:00"
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/journalism#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/journalism/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?name WHERE {
  ?reporters a :Reporters .
  ?reporters p:name ?name .
  ?reporters p:role ?role_w .
  ?reporters p:role ?role_w2 .
  ?reporters p:deadline ?deadline_w .
  FILTER((STR(?role_w) = "Reporter" || (STR(?role_w2) = "Photographer" && STR(?deadline_w) = "2021-03-18 16:30:00")))
}
